# hemingway-ai

Hemingway is a local development copy-editing companion for marketing sites.
It provides a browser overlay that generates alternatives and writes accepted edits back to source files.

## Canonical
- Site: https://hellohemingway.com/
- Repository: https://github.com/hunterassembly/hemingway-ai
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/hemingway-ai

## Docs
- Overview: https://hellohemingway.com/
- Installation: https://hellohemingway.com/install/
- Features: https://hellohemingway.com/features/
- FAQ: https://hellohemingway.com/faq/
- Changelog: https://hellohemingway.com/changelog/

## Runtime Model
- Local server process on localhost (default port 4800).
- Browser overlay discovers editable text and requests alternatives.
- Accepted edits are written back to project source files.

- PolyForm Shield 1.0.0: https://polyformproject.org/licenses/shield/1.0.0/
